The '''Ptera system''', also known as the '''Flax system''', contained the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Flax]], and was located in the [[Sumitra sector/Legends|Sumitra sector]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] {{1stID|Flax system}}
